problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor may resolve What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
